But taking a whole instrumental with no credit is so unethical. And Chuck got his dues and credits in the end through the courts.https://youtube.com/shorts/j0Uk8_lMTnw?si=xusHsRb9-a0zoFcshttps://youtu.be/YcDRS4xexJc?si=x2NVD03lHgZqt0_0
